creator: freebsd@oldach.net
text:
Reverted to base r330205:

toor@latitude /usr/src/sys/modules/iwm # make if_iwm.o
cc -O2 -pipe -DIWM_DEBUG  -fno-strict-aliasing -Werror -D_KERNEL -DKLD_MODULE -nostdinc   -I. -I/usr/src/sys -fno-common    -MD  -MF.depend.if_iwm.o -MTif_iwm.o -mno-mmx -mno-sse -msoft-float -ffreestanding -fwrapv -fstack-protector -Wall -Wredundant-decls -Wnested-externs -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Winline -Wcast-qual -Wundef -Wno-pointer-sign -D__printf__=__freebsd_kprintf__ -Wmissing-include-dirs -fdiagnostics-show-option -Wno-unknown-pragmas -Wno-error-tautological-compare -Wno-error-empty-body -Wno-error-parentheses-equality -Wno-error-unused-function -Wno-error-pointer-sign -Wno-error-shift-negative-value -Wno-error-address-of-packed-member  -mno-aes -mno-avx  -std=iso9899:1999 -c /usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c -o if_iwm.o
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:264:12: error: static declaration of 'iwm_enable_txq' follows
      non-static declaration
static int      iwm_enable_txq(struct iwm_softc *, int, int, int);
                ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm_util.h:129:12: note: previous declaration is here
extern  int iwm_enable_txq(struct iwm_softc *sc, int sta_id, int qid, int fifo);
            ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:344:12: error: static declaration of 'iwm_mvm_flush_tx_path'
      follows non-static declaration
static int      iwm_mvm_flush_tx_path(struct iwm_softc *sc,
                ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm_util.h:130:12: note: previous declaration is here
extern  int iwm_mvm_flush_tx_path(struct iwm_softc *sc, uint32_t tfd_msk,
            ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:1528:1: error: static declaration of 'iwm_enable_txq' follows
      non-static declaration
iwm_enable_txq(struct iwm_softc *sc, int sta_id, int qid, int fifo)
^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm_util.h:129:12: note: previous declaration is here
extern  int iwm_enable_txq(struct iwm_softc *sc, int sta_id, int qid, int fifo);
            ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:2569:8: error: use of undeclared identifier
      'IWM_LMPM_CPU_UCODE_LOADING_COMPLETED'
                                  (IWM_LMPM_CPU_UCODE_LOADING_COMPLETED |
                                   ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:2570:8: error: use of undeclared identifier
      'IWM_LMPM_CPU_HDRS_LOADING_COMPLETED'
                                   IWM_LMPM_CPU_HDRS_LOADING_COMPLETED |
                                   ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:2571:8: error: use of undeclared identifier
      'IWM_LMPM_CPU_UCODE_LOADING_STARTED'
                                   IWM_LMPM_CPU_UCODE_LOADING_STARTED) <<
                                   ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:2568:7: error: use of undeclared identifier
      'IWM_CSR_UCODE_LOAD_STATUS_ADDR'
                                  IWM_CSR_UCODE_LOAD_STATUS_ADDR,
                                  ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:3248:6: error: no member named 'rssi' in
      'struct ieee80211_rx_stats'
        rxs.rssi = rssi * 2;
        ~~~ ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:3249:6: error: no member named 'nf' in 'struct ieee80211_rx_stats'
        rxs.nf = sc->sc_noise;
        ~~~ ^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:3286:31: error: too many arguments to function call, expected 2,
      have 3
                ieee80211_input_mimo(ni, m, &rxs);
                ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~        ^~~~
/usr/src/sys/net80211/ieee80211_proto.h:86:1: note: 'ieee80211_input_mimo' declared here
int     ieee80211_input_mimo(struct ieee80211_node *, struct mbuf *);
^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:3290:35: error: too many arguments to function call, expected 2,
      have 3
                ieee80211_input_mimo_all(ic, m, &rxs);
                ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~        ^~~~
/usr/src/sys/net80211/ieee80211_proto.h:87:1: note: 'ieee80211_input_mimo_all' declared here
int     ieee80211_input_mimo_all(struct ieee80211com *, struct mbuf *);
^

      'struct iwm_notif_statistics'
                        sc->sc_noise = iwm_get_noise(sc, &stats->rx.general);
                                                          ~~~~~^
/usr/src/sys/dev/iwm/if_iwm.c:5469:11: note: forward declaration of
      'struct iwm_notif_statistics'
                        struct iwm_notif_statistics *stats;
                               ^
